text: SOS in Mangalore, homes near the river are flooded and people are stranded on rooftops.
Heavy rain in Udupi causing waterlogging and road blocked near the bus stand.
Cyclone warning issued for Coastal Karnataka, evacuate low lying areas in Mangaluru.
Light rain in Mangalore this morning, minor puddles but no major issues.
Fire reported in a warehouse on the outskirts of Udupi, emergency services on site.
Residents in Mangaluru say they are trapped due to sudden landslide near the highway.
Minor tremor felt in Udupi district, no damage reported yet.
Rescue teams dispatched as families are stranded near Mangalore river banks.
Road blocked in Udupi after heavy rain last night.
Coastal Karnataka on alert as cyclone winds intensify, evacuate coastal homes.
Emergency services report stranded boats near Mangalore harbor after rough sea.
Light drizzle in Udupi, traffic moving slowly but normal.
Firefighters control small fire in a shop in Mangaluru market area.
Rescue and relief camps set up in Udupi as rain continues.
People requested to evacuate low lying areas of Mangalore due to rising water level.
Minor landslide cleared on coastal highway near Udupi, traffic restored.
SOS call from Mangaluru suburb, families trapped after flash flood.
Waterlogging near Udupi railway station, buses diverted.
IMD issues alert for Coastal Karnataka, heavy rain expected tonight.
Evacuation underway in Mangaluru coastal wards, storm surge risk high.
